memory.summary: I'd rather skip the quick chore and just relax with my friends since I'm already stressed about the project.

desires: Avoid the awkwardness of saying 'no' to my friends and keep the group dynamic smooth
Get immediate relief from stress by skipping the trivial chore in favor of hanging out

goals.description: Join the friends for leisure activities immediately to maintain group harmony and avoid awkward rejection.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value (0.5) dominates my decision-making; keeping the 'cohort_3' dynamic smooth is more important than the term project or a quick chore. I am impulsive and will choose immediate social relief over future consequences.

goals.description: Postpone the trivial chore and the term project work until later tonight or tomorrow.
goals.rationale: I have a high procrastination bias (7) and short planning horizon. The stress of starting the project now outweighs the benefit, especially since doing it would interrupt my time with friends.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances g1 (group harmony) by joining friends immediately. I ignore the term project and chore (g2) due to my high procrastination bias and short planning horizon, prioritizing immediate social relief over future stress.
